name: elementor-json
description: Convert Figma/screenshot designs into Elementor template JSON for WordPress. Ships two skills: `elementor-json` (56-widget catalog covering free + Pro widgets, container patterns, custom_css recipes, gotchas) and `elementor-verify` (strict widget-first auditor invoked as a fresh subagent to catch hallucinated HTML widgets and CSS-as-layout-settings violations). Includes the `/verify-elementor` slash command.
